title: ScheduleExtraction
description: The exact shape Claude must return when parsing a construction schedule. Enforced via Anthropic tool use — Claude cannot deviate from this schema.

project.description: Project metadata extracted from the document header, title block, or letterhead.

projectName.description: Full project name as it appears on the schedule.

address.description: Project site address. Empty string if not found.

gcContact.description: Superintendent or primary contact name. Null if not found.

tasks.description: Every task on every page of the schedule. No trade skipped.

taskIdOriginal.description: The task ID or row number as it appears in the schedule. Null if not present.

taskName.description: Exact task name as it appears in the schedule.

building.description: Building identifier (e.g. 'Building A', 'Tower 1'). Null if not applicable.

floor.description: Floor identifier (e.g. 'Floor 3', 'Level 2'). Null if not applicable.

startDate.description: Task start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required — use best estimate if not clearly shown.

endDate.description: Task end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Null if not shown.

assignedResource.description: Company or trade assigned to this task. Null if not shown.

isOurTask.description: True ONLY if this task relates to cabinets, countertops, or backsplash (assigned to CKF, BAM, or explicitly mentions those items). False for all other tasks.
